name: Greentech Innovations, Inc.
business: The company develops and sells utility/entertainment mobile apps for Android and iOS platforms through its wholly owned subsidiary Analog Nest, and operates international online travel booking websites. Revenue is generated from app sales and in-app advertisements. The company has not generated any revenues in the years ended May 31, 2025 and 2024.

exposures.sentence: We are in the business of the creation and development of utility/entertainment apps for Google s Android and Apple s iOS platforms, through our wholly owned subsidiary, Analog Nest.
the Company owns and operates international online travel and hospitality web portals where users can search for flights and hotels and select the most economical options.

tamClaims.claim: In the past five years the number of total apps on the Google Play Store has increased from around 200,000 in 2011 to around 1.6 million in 2015 and currently about 2 million apps in the Apple s App store as well.
tamClaims.sentence: In the past five years the number of total apps on the Google Play Store has increased from around 200,000 in 2011 to around 1.6 million in 2015 and currently about 2 million apps in the Apple s App store as well.

tamClaims.claim: There are billions of mobile devices for which we can offer Apps.
tamClaims.sentence: With the mobile market still booming, there are billions of mobile devices for which we can offer Apps.
